info.title: AMA Server
info.summary: Attendance Management API with indoor GIS support
info.description: AMA Server provides APIs for employee attendance, account access, trusted devices, shifts, fraud detection, audit logging, and indoor GIS/geofence data. Database objects are managed with Alembic in the business and gis schemas.

post.description: Create a new Employee + Account in one call, then auto-login. Demo-friendly: no auth required, role can be specified.
Authenticate with username and password. Returns access and refresh tokens.
Issue a new access token using a valid refresh token.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's account and employee profile.

post.description: Revoke the current access token and optionally the refresh token.
